title: Open Cloze: The Story of Chocolate

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym slowem, tak aby powstal spojny i poprawny logicznie oraz gramatycznie tekst.
tasks.text: Chocolate is one 1.1. _________ the most popular treats in the world, but it has 1.2. _________ around for thousands of years. The ancient Maya were among the first people 1.3. _________ grew cacao trees. They did not eat chocolate 1.4. _________ we do today; instead, they made 1.5. _________ into a bitter drink. The drink was 1.6. _________ valuable that the beans were sometimes used as money. 1.7. _________ chocolate first arrived in Europe, only the rich could afford it. Sugar was later added to make it sweeter, and 1.8. _________ a result it became far more popular. Today, more 1.9. _________ four million tonnes of cacao are produced every year. Without the hard work of farmers, we 1.10. _________ not be able to enjoy our favourite chocolate bars.
